name: Volumizing Mascara
description: A high-performance mascara that dramatically increases lash volume and length. The unique brush separates each lash while the formula adds thickness from root to tip. Long-lasting and smudge-proof for all-day wear.

name: Hydrating Face Serum
description: An intensive hydrating serum with hyaluronic acid that plumps and moisturises the skin. Suitable for all skin types. Apply two to three drops to cleansed skin morning and evening before moisturiser.

name: Matte Lipstick - Ruby Red
description: A highly pigmented matte lipstick in a bold ruby red shade. The formula is moisturising and long-wearing, providing up to 8 hours of colour. Does not feather or bleed. Cruelty-free.

name: SPF 50 Daily Sunscreen
description: A lightweight, non-greasy sunscreen offering broad-spectrum SPF 50 protection. Invisible finish suitable for use under makeup. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes. Reef-safe formula.

name: Brightening Eye Cream
description: A targeted eye cream that reduces the appearance of dark circles and puffiness. Contains caffeine and vitamin C. Apply gently with the ring finger around the orbital bone morning and night.

name: Setting Powder
description: A translucent loose setting powder that locks makeup in place for up to 12 hours. Controls shine and minimises the appearance of pores. Suitable for all skin tones.
